title: Nasdaq 100 tops 20-year returns at 21%; Nifty Midcap leads Indian markets: Which investment created more wealth?
summary: The Nasdaq 100 emerged as the biggest long-term wealth creator over the last 20 years, with 21.3% returns. Among Indian equity benchmarks, the Nifty Midcap 150 TRI delivered the highest annualised return over the same period at 16.3%.

title: EPFO centralised database migration: Single portal for claims, digital interface, CITES project — Key features explained
summary: The Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) has this month migrated entire member database to the Centralised IT Enabled Services (CITES) project. The overhaul of its digital infrastructure aims to make services faster, transparent and more citizen centric.

title: Received money, shares or property as a gift? It may be tax-free, but here's when you will have to pay tax
summary: Gifts from family can be tax-exempt, but not always. Tax treatment varies based on the giver, value, and occasion. Here's when a gift is tax-free when it becomes taxable.

title: Quant Small Cap Fund portfolio: Reliance Industries among 9 stock exits, 5 new additions in June
summary: Quant Small Cap added five new stocks to its portfolio in June while making complete exits from nine companies, including Reliance Industries. The fund also sharply increased holdings in RBL Bank, Sona BLW Precision Forgings and Anand Rathi Wealth while trimming exposure to several existing stocks.

title: Who is an NRI for income tax purposes? Know the conditions under which ITR filing is required in India
summary: Living abroad does not automatically exempt NRIs from filing an ITR in India. Tax filing depends on residential status, income earned from Indian sources, and other conditions such as salary, rent, capital gains, business income, TDS refunds, and DTAA claims.

title: Confused about which ITR form to file? Here's how the Income Tax e-filing portal helps you choose the right one
summary: The Income Tax e-filing portal helps taxpayers identify the correct ITR form through eligibility conditions and a guided questionnaire. Users can also determine applicable schedules, making the return filing process simpler.&nbsp;

title: Only one international mutual fund remains open for fresh SIPs after 11 schemes shut doors
summary: Fresh SIP registrations into international mutual funds have nearly come to a halt after PGIM, Franklin Templeton and Edelweiss suspended new inflows into 11 schemes. Existing SIPs, however, will continue uninterrupted.

title: Earning ₹13 lakhs? Old vs new tax regime comparison shows which saves more tax
summary: The new tax regime may be a better choice for salaried employees earning around ₹13 lakh a year. Here's how much tax you pay under each regime and the savings you can make.

title: EPFO introduces Amnesty Scheme 2026 for exempted PF trusts; employers get six months to regularise status
summary: EPFO has introduced the Amnesty Scheme, 2026, giving employers operating exempted Provident Fund (PF) trusts a one-time opportunity to regularise their legal status.

title: 'Beta, when are you buying a house?' Expert says don't give in to social pressure; buy only if these conditions are met
summary: A couple faced pressure to buy a house but learned that renting may be financially wiser. With the rent yielding only 2-3% annually on a ₹1.5 crore flat, they debated the benefits of down payments versus investments, concluding that homeownership should not be driven by social expectations.

title: Market trading guide: CDSL among 2 stock recommendations for Monday
summary: Markets rebounded sharply on Friday, supported by positive global cues and encouraging IT earnings. Analysts recommend CDSL and Sumitomo Chemical India as technical buy ideas, citing bullish breakouts, strong volumes and improving momentum indicators.

title: Vijay Kedia buys 3.58 lakh shares in this IT company that nearly doubled investor money
summary: Vijay Kedia-backed Kedia Securities has picked up a 3.56% stake in SME IT firm Exato Technologies, taking total holding to 9.68%. The stock has surged over 90% in a year. The move has drawn investor attention to the recently listed company amid continued interest in high-growth smallcap technology p

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Monday
summary: The Sensex and Nifty surged over 1% on Friday, supported by TCS earnings, easing volatility and positive global cues. Investors will now track Q1 earnings, technical levels and global developments for further market direction.

title: NSE listing to "complete the trioka" and unlock value, drive governance upgrade: Report
summary: A potential NSE listing is positioned as the final step to "complete the trioka" of India's market infrastructure, with forward-looking benefits expected in transparency, valuation discovery and global index inclusion, according to a research report by Jefferies.

title: Mcap of 4 of top-10 most valued firms jumps Rs 92,995 cr; HDFC Bank, Airtel top gainers
summary: Last week, four major firms experienced a significant market valuation increase of over Rs 92,000 crore, with HDFC Bank and Bharti Airtel leading the charge. Despite benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty dipping slightly and breaking their winning streak due to geopolitical tensions and escalating crud

title: Largecap funds no longer the best bet? Edelweiss CIO Trideep Bhattacharya explains why flexicaps may win now
summary: Edelweiss CIO Trideep Bhattacharya argues that largecap funds may be losing their edge due to structural market share shifts. He favours flexicap and midcap funds for better growth potential, remains underweight IT amid transition, and is bullish on financials, while selectively approaching small ca

title: Iran moves to close Strait of Hormuz. Should investors fear a Nifty crash in coming days?
summary: Indian equities are likely to remain volatile this week as escalating tensions in West Asia and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz threaten to push crude oil prices higher. Investors will also monitor Q1 earnings, inflation data, FII flows and global risk sentiment for market direction.

title: HCL Tech Q1 preview: Revenue may dip QoQ; net profit could rise on currency depreciation
summary: HCL Technologies is expected to report a mixed performance for the June quarter, with brokerages forecasting steady year-on-year profit growth but sequential revenue weakness. Investors will closely watch AI-led demand, margins, deal wins and any changes to the company's FY27 guidance.

title: 10 debt-free penny stocks under Rs 10 rally up to 1,126% in one year. Did you catch them?
summary: Debt-free penny stocks priced under Rs 10 have delivered outsized returns of up to 1,126% over the past year, despite weak broader markets. Trendlyne data highlights sharp gains driven by liquidity and sentiment, but underlying risks remain high due to weak earnings, low market capitalisation and vo

title: SBI MF among 6 IPOs on investors' radar this week. GMPs indicate listing gains up to 118%
summary: India's IPO market is set for another busy week with five public issues across the mainboard and SME segments. Millworks Technologies leads the grey market premium chart, while SBI Funds Management and Alpine Texworld are among the key IPOs opening for subscription.
